center.name: 帕洛平托縣 (德克薩斯州)
center.summary: 帕洛平托縣 (德克薩斯州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Golden-cheeked warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: chrysoparia | synonyms = Dendroica chrysoparia Sclater & Salvin, 1861 }} The golden-cheeked warbler (Setophaga chrysoparia) is an endangered species of bird that breeds in Central Texas, from Palo Pinto County southwestward along the eastern and southern edge of the Edwards Plateau to Kinney County
